description_long: This is a modern, widescreen curved computer monitor with a sleek, minimalist design. The display features a thin, black bezel that frames the screen, enhancing its contemporary appearance. The monitor is supported by a distinctive, angular stand with geometric cutouts, providing both stability and a unique visual flair. The rear of the monitor is smooth and unadorned, with no visible buttons or ports, emphasizing its clean lines. The screen displays a desktop interface with a soft, misty landscape background, suggesting it is powered on. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with a glass or acrylic display surface.
description: A curved widescreen computer monitor with a thin black bezel and a geometric, angular stand, featuring a clean, modern look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved display, thin bezel, and the desktop interface on the screen.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pronounced curvature of the screen and the angular, sculpted stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unmarked back panel and the full structure of the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the monitor's curvature and the stand's geometric design.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and uniform around the display, with sharp corners and a matte finish, providing a modern, unobtrusive frame.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, angular pedestal with geometric cutouts, made of black plastic or metal, and appears fixed with no visible adjustability.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any edge or panel of the monitor.
